chunks.title: Prophecy of the Mountain of Yahweh
chunks.reason: Introduces the vision and describes the future gathering of nations to Zion for instruction and peace.

chunks.title: Diagnosis of Israel's Sin
chunks.reason: Explains the cause of judgment through idolatry, foreign influences, and wealth.

chunks.title: The Day of Yahweh's Judgment
chunks.reason: Describes the coming terror where human pride and idols are humbled before God's majesty.
